Variables.Name: OverwriteBuffName
Variables.Description: 覆盖的Buff名字，该字段不为空时UI优先显示覆盖的Buff名字

Variables.Name: OverwriteBuffDetail
Variables.Description: 覆盖的Buff描述，该字段不为空时UI优先显示覆盖的Buff描述

Variables.Name: OverwriteBuffIcon
Variables.Description: 覆盖的Buff图标，该字段不为空时UI优先显示覆盖的Buff图标

Variables.Name: bShowUI
Variables.Description: Buff是否显示表示当前状态的图标在UI上
